description_long: This object is a vintage manual typewriter with a robust, rectangular body finished in a matte brown color. The front features a full set of round, raised keys arranged in a classic typewriter layout, with a metallic bar above the keys for paper alignment. On either side of the carriage are large, textured knobs for manual paper feed, and a metallic paper support is visible at the top. The base appears to be made of a darker, wood-textured material, and a handle is integrated into the front for portability. The rear of the typewriter is smooth and unadorned, with the carriage and paper support extending above the main body. The overall design suggests durability and a utilitarian aesthetic, typical of mid-20th-century office equipment.
description: A vintage brown manual typewriter with round keys, side knobs, and a wood-textured base, featuring a classic utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, metallic bar, and integrated handle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large carriage knob and the profile of the keybed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back and the raised paper support structure.
description_view_3: Right side view with the opposite carriage knob and the return lever visible.
